form.formComment: Made debut from 8 and immediately opened winning account, scoring a 6 length win (20.08) over 350m at this track. Has returned in winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Mix on April 14 over 450m at this track behind Zippy Tippy beaten 4.5 lengths (26.01). Good beginner who will put himself in the race.
